# botyard_skills (Data Source)

Lists all skills in the organization's skill catalogue.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List the skill catalogue and collect the ids of every org-scoped skill.
data "botyard_skills" "all" {}

locals {
  org_skill_ids = [
    for s in data.botyard_skills.all.skills : s.id if s.scope == "org"
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `skills` (Attributes List) All skills in the organization's skill catalogue. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--skills))

<a id="nestedatt--skills"></a>
### Nested Schema for `skills`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp (RFC 3339).
- `file_count` (Number) Number of files in the skill.
- `id` (String) Unique skill identifier (UUID). Use this as `skill_ids` in `botyard_bot_skill_assignment`.
- `name` (String) Human-readable display name.
- `provider` (String) Who authored/provided the skill.
- `scope` (String) Visibility scope (e.g. `org`, `platform`).
- `slug` (String) URL-safe skill identifier.
- `summary` (String) Brief description of the skill.
- `updated_at` (String) Last-update timestamp (RFC 3339).
